title: PlanReviewAssembleCriteriaInput
description: INPUT of `plan_review_assemble_criteria`: the ticket to route criteria for.

ticket_id.description: The ticket id/alias (falls back to the workflow target).

probe_criteria.description: PROBE MODE (drift-refresh tripwire): when non-empty, restrict the included criteria to EXACTLY these ids (forced, bypassing applies()/overlay routing) — the cheap E4+G1G2 probe. Empty/absent → the full routed criteria set (normal review).
